author: Ameen Hassan
summary: Short session in which Ameen opened a Bash tool output file containing a 360Chicago analysis.json and asked about missing follow-up questions and 'ask next session' items that were expected in the gap report. The session was brief — the last prompt was 'what happened to all the follow up questions and ask next session?' and the AI title confirms the topic was investigating the missing follow-up questions feature. The report felt incomplete with several expected sections absent.
problems: Gap report output was missing the follow-up questions and 'ask next session' sections that were expected
Report felt incomplete compared to what the pipeline was supposed to produce
approaches: Opened analysis.json output from a 360Chicago run to review its contents
Asked why follow-up questions and ask-next-session items were missing from the report
results: Session ended without resolution — hit rate limit or session ended before diagnosis was complete
open_questions: Why are follow-up questions and ask-next-session items missing from the gap report output?
Were these sections ever implemented or were they dropped in a prior refactor?
